Class AsyncApi31ComponentsImpl

java.lang.Object
io.apicurio.datamodels.models.NodeImpl
io.apicurio.datamodels.models.asyncapi.v3x.v31.AsyncApi31ComponentsImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
AsyncApiComponents, AsyncApiExtensible, AsyncApi3xComponents, AsyncApi3xExtensible, AsyncApi31Components, AsyncApi31Extensible, Components, Extensible, Node, Visitable
public class AsyncApi31ComponentsImpl extends NodeImpl implements AsyncApi31Components
